title: Path-coeffient study in gram
abstract: In the winter season of 1971-72,49 pure strains of gram (Cicer arietinum L.) from different parts of the country were grown and their genotypic and phenotypic correlations and path analysis were done for yield and yield components. Correlation and path studies indicated that number of pods/plant and 100-grain weight have larger effect on grain yield than any other component.
